content:
- Completed the Nix install task: official single-user install succeeded on SELinux-enforcing AlmaLinux, fresh-shell `nix --version` works, `~/.config/nix/nix.conf` enables `nix-command flakes`, and `nix flake metadata github:NixOS/nixpkgs` succeeded from the repo workspace.
- Required validation all passed after installation: `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test`.
- Updated the task markdown to `<status>done</status> <passes>true</passes>`, checked the plan slices, and ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`. Next I need to stage all changes, commit with the required task-finished message including test evidence, push, and then stop.
